/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wno-tautological-constant-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_ancillaries.dir/test_ancillaries.cpp.o -o ../bin/test_ancillaries   -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/8.5.0  -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib64  -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/build/lib ../lib/libtestutil.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a ../lib/libzmq.so.5.2.6 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so -lbsd -lrt ../lib/libunity.a
